accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately reflect its findings and operative provisions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; figures and provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the War Powers Resolution and the expedited procedures invoked under federal law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs and the declaration/authorization exception.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates or deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the directive to remove forces, the findings, and the carve-outs faithfully.

objective_tone.why: Neutral presentation attributing findings to Congress without editorializing.

concise.why: No padding or repetition; appropriately condensed.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the President, Congress, War Powers Resolution, Iran, and Israel.

correct_figures.why: April 10, 2026, 13 killed and at least 350 wounded match the bill.
